Package neqsim.process.operations

Class OperationalEvidencePackage

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.OperationalEvidencePackage
public final class OperationalEvidencePackage extends Object
Builds an operational evidence package from document-derived tags, field data, scenarios, and NeqSim bottleneck analysis.

The class intentionally orchestrates existing NeqSim features rather than replacing them: OperationalTagMap applies and reads logical plant tags, OperationalScenarioRunner executes what-if actions, and ProcessSystem.findBottleneck() plus the registered capacity strategies identify limiting equipment.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

      JSON serializer used for embedded operational result objects.

  • Constructor Details

    • OperationalEvidencePackage

      private OperationalEvidencePackage()
      Private constructor for utility class.

  • Method Details

    • buildReport

      public static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildReport(String studyName, ProcessSystem process, OperationalTagMap tagMap, Map<String,Double> fieldData, List<OperationalScenario> scenarios, double benchmarkToleranceFraction)
      Builds a complete operational evidence package report.
      Parameters:
      studyName - name of the study or operating case
      process - process system already built from NeqSim JSON
      tagMap - logical operational tag map, may be empty
      fieldData - field data keyed by logical tag or historian tag, may be empty
      scenarios - scenario list to run on copied base cases, may be empty
      benchmarkToleranceFraction - allowed relative deviation for benchmark tags; use a value from 0.0 to 1.0 where 0.05 means five percent
      Returns:
      JSON object containing base evidence, benchmark comparison, bottlenecks, scenarios, and quality gates

    • buildCapacityReport

      public static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildCapacityReport(ProcessSystem process)
      Builds a capacity and bottleneck report for a process system.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to inspect
      Returns:
      JSON object with bottleneck, utilization summary, near-limit equipment, and constraint details

    • buildBenchmarkComparison

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildBenchmarkComparison(OperationalTagMap tagMap, Map<String,Double> fieldData, Map<String,Double> modelValues, double toleranceFraction)
      Builds benchmark comparisons for tags marked as BENCHMARK.
      Parameters:
      tagMap - operational tag map
      fieldData - field data keyed by logical or historian tag
      modelValues - current model values keyed by logical tag
      toleranceFraction - allowed relative deviation
      Returns:
      JSON benchmark comparison block

    • buildBenchmarkEntry

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildBenchmarkEntry(OperationalTagBinding binding, Double fieldValue, Double modelValue, double toleranceFraction)
      Builds one benchmark comparison entry.
      Parameters:
      binding - operational tag binding
      fieldValue - field value, or null when missing
      modelValue - model value, or null when missing
      toleranceFraction - allowed relative deviation
      Returns:
      JSON benchmark entry

    • findFieldValue

      private static Double findFieldValue(OperationalTagBinding binding, Map<String,Double> fieldData)
      Finds a field value for a binding from logical or historian keys.
      Parameters:
      binding - operational tag binding
      fieldData - source field data
      Returns:
      matched field value, or null when no value is present

    • buildScenarioReports

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray buildScenarioReports(ProcessSystem baseProcess, List<OperationalScenario> scenarios)
      Runs all configured scenarios on copied base cases.
      Parameters:
      baseProcess - base process after field data application
      scenarios - scenarios to run
      Returns:
      JSON array of scenario evidence blocks

    • buildQualityGates

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildQualityGates(com.google.gson.JsonObject baseCapacity, com.google.gson.JsonObject benchmarkComparison, com.google.gson.JsonArray scenarioReports, boolean hasTagBindings)
      Builds quality gates for the operational evidence package.
      Parameters:
      baseCapacity - base capacity report
      benchmarkComparison - benchmark comparison block
      scenarioReports - scenario reports
      hasTagBindings - true when tag bindings were supplied
      Returns:
      JSON object with gate status values

    • areScenariosSuccessful

      private static boolean areScenariosSuccessful(com.google.gson.JsonArray scenarioReports)
      Checks whether every scenario report is successful.
      Parameters:
      scenarioReports - scenario report array
      Returns:
      true when no scenario has failed

    • findStrategyBottleneck

      private static BottleneckResult findStrategyBottleneck(ProcessSystem process)
      Finds the bottleneck using registered equipment capacity strategies.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to inspect
      Returns:
      bottleneck result, or an empty result when no strategy provides constraints

    • bottleneckToJson

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject bottleneckToJson(BottleneckResult bottleneck, String source)
      Converts a bottleneck result to JSON.
      Parameters:
      bottleneck - bottleneck result
      source - source used to detect the bottleneck
      Returns:
      JSON object

      Returns:

      Checks whether any strategy-derived equipment detail exceeds a hard limit.
      Parameters:
      equipmentDetails - equipment details array
      Returns:
      true if any detail has a hard limit exceeded

    • hasStrategyCapacityExceeded

      private static boolean hasStrategyCapacityExceeded(com.google.gson.JsonArray equipmentDetails)
      Checks whether any strategy-derived equipment detail exceeds design capacity.
      Parameters:
      equipmentDetails - equipment details array
      Returns:
      true if any detail is over design capacity

      equipmentDetails - equipment details array
      Returns:

      Requires a non-null process system.

      process - process system to validate
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if process is null

      private static double normalizeTolerance(double toleranceFraction)
      Normalizes benchmark tolerance input.
      Parameters:
      toleranceFraction - requested tolerance fraction
      Returns:
      valid non-negative tolerance fraction

      Cleans the study name used in reports.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      non-empty study name
